summary.intent: Add a generic webhook ingress system to Moltis that triggers AI agents on events from GitHub, GitLab, Stripe, and other providers, with full UI management and delivery tracking.
summary.outcome: Fully implemented the `moltis-webhooks` crate with provider profiles, auth verification, event filtering, deduplication, rate limiting, crash recovery, and a settings-only web UI; wired into gateway and HTTP server; added docs, website updates, and 51 tests. PR #575 created and iteratively hardened through multiple review cycles.

repo: Sidebar nav icons are rendered via CSS `::before` pseudo-elements in `components.css` using `data-section` attribute selectors — not from any `icon` property in the JS sections array
There are two style.css files: `src/assets/style.css` (Tailwind output, served) and `src/assets/css/style.css` (separate copy) — only the former is served via the versioned asset path
SQLite `ON DELETE CASCADE` requires `PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON` per-connection; the fix is to set it on `SqliteConnectOptions` at pool creation, not per-query
The `with_options` pattern returns `Arc<Self>` immediately, making `Arc::get_mut` a fragile way to set fields post-construction — use `OnceLock` instead for late initialization on shared state
Website i18n is handled by `website/scripts/build-i18n.mjs` via string replacement; running it regenerates all 9 language files from the English template
Webhook ingress endpoint must be exempted from session auth middleware in `auth_middleware.rs` and have CORS headers for browser-based testing tools
The Changelog Guard CI blocks any manual edits to `CHANGELOG.md` — it is auto-generated from commit history via `git-cliff`
RPC method authorization lists are in `crates/gateway/src/methods/mod.rs` (read/write split)
The `ipnet` crate is already a workspace dependency and can be added to any crate's Cargo.toml without a version

code.finding: Stripe timestamp validation must fail closed — non-numeric `t=` values must be rejected, not silently skipped
Generic profile should NOT fall back to body SHA-256 hash as dedup key — return None so identical test payloads aren't silently deduplicated
Crash recovery drain must include `processing` status alongside `received`/`queued` — deliveries mid-execution during shutdown must be retried
Even with CASCADE defined in migration, `delete_webhook` should explicitly delete child rows to handle pooled connections where the pragma may not be active
`agent_id` from webhook config must be forwarded to `chat.send_sync` params — otherwise the per-webhook agent preset is ignored at runtime
String truncation by byte index panics on multibyte UTF-8; need `truncate_str()` that walks back to a char boundary
Auth secrets in `auth_config` and `source_config` must be redacted via `Webhook::redacted()` before returning from list/get/create/update RPCs
`gitlab_token` auth mode must use key `token` in auth_config, not `secret` — the JS modal had a branch ordering bug

workflow: Using `Arc::get_mut` to set fields post-construction is fragile and silently fails when any clone exists — prefer `OnceLock` for late-initialized shared state
Browser-based webhook testing tools (Hoppscotch web) fail against localhost with self-signed certs due to CORS + mixed-content restrictions; the desktop app or curl is required
Rate limiters with separate read/write locks have TOCTOU gaps — use a single `Mutex` for atomic check-and-record
PR review bots flag stale issues on old commits; verify against current code before acting on JS unused-import warnings
The `scripts/test-webhook.sh` pattern (verbose curl with provider-specific HMAC signing) is valuable for integration smoke testing during development

friction: `Arc::get_mut` silently returned `None` post-construction, causing `webhook_store` and `webhook_worker_tx` to stay `None` — the ingress handler returned 404 on every request with no error log

The sidebar icon system is fully opaque from the JS side — the `icon` property in the sections array is unused; only `components.css` `::before` rules matter, which required deep CSS archaeology to discover
Hoppscotch web cannot reach localhost with self-signed TLS, requiring discovery of the desktop app alternative
Two `style.css` files at different paths with different content caused confusion about which was being served
The Changelog Guard CI failure required identifying and restoring `CHANGELOG.md` to the main branch state

Multiple PR review cycles caught issues that should have been caught by tests upfront: GitLab token key name, Stripe timestamp validation, CIDR enforcement never wired in, ON DELETE CASCADE not working without pragma
open_items: Live-refresh of chat UI when background workers append messages to already-open sessions (affects both webhooks and cron named sessions) — filed as beads issue moltis-2pu
CIDR allowlist enforcement relies on `X-Forwarded-For`/`X-Real-Ip` headers which are spoofable; proper fix requires `ConnectInfo` extractor with axum `into_make_service_with_connect_info`
i18n translations for the new Webhooks feature card on the website — currently stays in English across all 9 language files
GitLab, Stripe, Linear, PagerDuty, and Sentry source profiles exist in the plan but only GitHub, GitLab, and Stripe were implemented in the profiles module
Response action tools (post comments, merge PRs, issue refunds) described in the plan were not implemented — agents can receive events but cannot act back via typed tools
The `per_entity` session mode with per-entity locking described in the plan was not implemented
